div.h1: ARCHITECTURE SPECIFICATION: ON-DEMAND PAGE TABLE ALLOCATION
div.h2: MODULE: Virtual Memory Manager (VMM) - Fault Handler Subsystem
div.p: TDD Reference: M3-04 handled by vmm_allocate_table_on_demand()
Must zero memory to prevent information leakage between address spaces. c memset(table_ptr, 0, PAGE_SIZE);

ol.li: Usually results in a Soft Page Fault to load the actual data page.

div.p: Invariant: CR3 remains constant; only memory contents and PDE bits change. Atomic: PDE update must be atomic to prevent race conditions in SMP.
